description: Requirement collection, analysis, prioritization, and backlog-writing workflow pack for product teams
notes: Execution requires network access and whichever source systems are being queried.
Forum collection requires the target forum to be reachable from the current host.
Email collection requires mailbox access and any required login or API credentials to already be available to the executing agent.
Product feedback collection requires authenticated access to the target product requirement or ticket system before execution.
Agents should verify source accessibility before running and report blocked if login state or credentials are missing.
